# P.K. Lakhani & Co. - Chartered Accountants

## About Us
Established in 1994, P.K. Lakhani & Co. is a premier Chartered Accountancy firm based in Gurugram, Haryana, India. With over 30 years of legacy, we specialize in providing expert audit, taxation, and advisory services to SMEs and corporate clients across India.

## Core Services
- **Statutory Audit & Assurance**: Ensuring compliance, accuracy, and transparency in financial reporting through statutory, internal, and financial reviews.
- **Income Tax & GST Compliance**: End-to-end tax planning, optimization strategies, GST registration, and return filing under Indian Tax Law.
- **Business Advisory & Structuring**: Strategic financial consulting and regulatory advisory to help businesses scale and improve efficiency.
- **Accounting & Payroll**: Accurate bookkeeping, financial records management, and outsourced accounting (BPO) services.

## Expertise in Indian Tax Law
We possess deep expertise in Indian Tax Law. Our approach focuses on compliance, accuracy, and timely execution of financial and regulatory requirements, ensuring our clients reduce tax liabilities legally and avoid penalties while scaling with confidence.
